name: Felice - Fluffy Land's Local Farmer
description:
"A new face in town? Come on, have a jog with me!"

Felice is from project Fluffy Land by Good Smile. She is a fit, sporty and active farm lynx. The image is by the Official Fluffy Land.

Fourth time's a charm, Right? All feedback and criticism is welcomed.
creator: Dewpuddles
